productDisplayName: Palm Tree Girl's Blenda White Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite and orchid pink sleeveless floral printed dress made of 100% cotton, with pink attached belt under the chest, four buttoned closure on the back and pink attached sash on the back and ruffled hemlineFittingRegular Waist - 22 - 24 inches Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get ready to indulge your little girl in the spirit of spring with this vibrant white and pink floral dress from gini and jony. The orchid pink floral design adds to the celebratory effect of the dress. Team this with comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
